heading: Thursday Night
text: Rain likely, changing to snow showers late.

heading: Friday
text: Decreasing clouds, blustery, and much colder.

heading: Saturday
text: Chance of a snow shower in the Adirondacks.
temperature: Mid 20s to lower 30s north, low to mid 30s south

heading: Sunday
text: Chance of a rain or snow shower far north.
temperature: Mid 40s to lower 50s south, mainly mid to upper 40s north
